overview.description: Vietnam's F&B and hospitality sector is large and fragmented with a booming restaurant scene and growing hotel industry driven by tourism. AI use cases include demand forecasting, personalized recommendations, chatbot reservations, and dynamic pricing.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$35B F&B market; ~$30B tourism contributing 10%+ of GDP pre-COVID
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$250B F&B and hospitality market; strong post-COVID recovery

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Medium — fragmented across millions of small restaurants; chain restaurants data-rich
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Low — most F&B businesses lack digital POS; hospitality chains have better data

painPoints.problem: Food waste from poor demand forecasting costs restaurants significantly
Menu and offer personalization is minimal; recommendation engines are rare
Reservation and customer service chatbots are underutilized
Dynamic pricing for hotels and restaurants is manual

relatedNodes.description: F&B and retail share inventory management and demand forecasting needs.
